faq.q: How many GCC centers does Basware operate in India?
faq.a: Basware operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Basware have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Basware's India GCC presence is in Chandigarh.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Basware run in India?
faq.a: Basware runs gcc/gic centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Basware's India GCCs?
faq.a: Basware's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Basware's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 6 leaders at Basware's India centers, across IT, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.
